_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Docs-page document rendering — server-side Mermaid render is uncached and dark-mode-unaware (slow loads, white-on-white diagram labels, blank HTML/PDF tabs)

steps.description: Render mmdc Mermaid SVGs with a deterministic light theme + enforced dark label colours so labels are readable on any page background; keep the kroki and raw-<pre> fallbacks. dashboard/utils/markdown.py only.
Code review of S01 (backend-impl) — markdown.py Mermaid render theme/label-colour fix

docs_detail.html: render Mermaid client-side on the Markdown tab via components/libs/mermaid.html (theme-aware); detect doc_type=diagram raw-DSL content and render it as a diagram. research_detail.html: same minimal client-side Mermaid treatment for parity.
Code review of S03 (frontend-impl) — docs_detail.html / research_detail.html client-side diagram render

docs.py: render_mermaid=False for the interactive markdown panel; cache html-view/pdf-view renders to docs/.generated keyed by ProjectDoc.version (html_path/pdf_path); 200 + 'PDF unavailable' page instead of bare 503; wrap raw-DSL doc_type=diagram content in a ```mermaid fence before rendering.
Code review of S05 (api-impl) — docs.py version-keyed cache, graceful PDF fallback, render_mermaid=False
Code review of S07 (tests-impl) — test coverage and semantic correctness
Global cross-agent review of all I-00080 work
QV: Linting (ruff + dashboard JS + Jinja2 template checks)
QV: Browser verification — diagram doc loads fast, labels readable in dark mode, HTML/PDF tabs render or show a clear message; no regressions on adjacent Docs flows
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
